name: Vacationland
description_short: Vacationland is a 590-site family campground resort in western Pennsylvania offering RV camping, cabin rentals, and recreational activities—not a consumer finance company.
description_long:
Vacationland Campground is a recreational facility located in western Pennsylvania, established in 1972 and situated on 85 acres adjacent to Maurice K. Goddard State Park. The campground operates as a seasonal destination resort serving families and outdoor enthusiasts seeking camping and vacation experiences. The facility is not a financial services provider, consumer lending company, credit service, or payday alternative lender of any kind. Vacationland exclusively offers accommodation and recreation services.

The company provides RV camping sites with various hookup options (30-amp and 50-amp electrical service with water and sewage), tent camping areas, and multiple cabin rental types ranging from primitive to deluxe accommodations. Amenities include Wi-Fi access, planned activities and entertainment, a snack shop (Snak Shak), kid's play areas, and on-site supplies. Guests have access to adjacent state park facilities including Lake Wilhelm for fishing and boating, plus a 12-mile paved trail system.

Vacationland differentiates itself through its large inventory of 590 spacious sites across 85 acres, diverse accommodation options to suit different camping preferences and budgets, proximity to state park recreation, and year-round planned activities. The campground emphasizes family-friendly amenities and has been operating continuously since 1972, establishing multi-generational customer loyalty.

Vacationland is fundamentally a campground and vacation resort business with no financial services component. It has been incorrectly categorized as a "payday-alternatives" lender. This company should not appear on CreditDoc or any consumer finance platform, as it provides zero financial products, credit services, lending, or payment solutions. There is no legitimate consumer finance application for this business profile.
services: RV camping site rentals with 30-amp electrical hookups
Full hookup RV sites with 50-amp electrical service, water, and sewage
2-bedroom cabin rentals (Big Bear, Bucktail, Park Model styles)
Food service (Snak Shak with sandwiches, burgers, and camping favorites)
pros: Large inventory of 590 sites across 85 acres with diverse site types (pull-through, back-in, tent areas)
Multiple cabin rental options at different price points (primitive, standard, deluxe, park model)
Full hookup options available including 50-amp electrical service with water and sewage
Adjacent access to Maurice K. Goddard State Park with Lake Wilhelm and 12-mile paved recreational trail
Planned on-site activities and entertainment programming
On-site food service (Snak Shak) and supply shop
cons: Website lacks specific pricing transparency for most accommodation types
No information about cancellation policies, deposit requirements, or terms of service
Limited accessibility information for guests with mobility concerns
best_for: Families seeking multi-week or seasonal summer vacation accommodations
RV owners looking for full-service campground facilities with hookups
First-time campers interested in cabin rentals as a low-commitment camping introduction
diagnosis: Vacationland Campground is a recreational campground and vacation resort, not a consumer finance company. It provides zero financial services, lending products, credit solutions, or payday alternatives. This profile is fundamentally miscategorized and should be removed from CreditDoc entirely, as the company has no relevance to consumer finance research or credit-related services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
